title: Build Phishing and Keylogger Detection System

requirements.text: Implement phishing URL detection module that analyzes URLs for suspicious patterns including: keywords commonly used in phishing attacks, IP-based domains, excessive subdomains, missing HTTPS certificates, and domain reputation scoring

quotes: Detect phishing URLs using pattern and domain analysis
The phishing detection module analyzes URLs for suspicious keywords, IP-based domains, excessive subdomains, and HTTPS certificate issues

acceptanceCriteria: Backend accepts URL input and returns phishing risk assessment
Detection checks for suspicious keywords in URLs
Detection identifies IP-based domains as high risk
Detection flags URLs with excessive subdomains
Detection verifies HTTPS certificate presence
Returns threat score and specific risk factors identified

requirements.text: Create keylogger detection module that monitors and analyzes system processes for suspicious behavior including: process name pattern matching against known keylogger signatures, detection of processes with abnormal keyboard API usage patterns, and identification of hidden or disguised processes

quotes: Monitor suspicious background processes for keylogging behavior
The keylogger detection module scans running processes using the psutil library and checks for suspicious names or abnormal keyboard API usage patterns

acceptanceCriteria: Backend can scan and return list of running processes
Detection identifies processes with suspicious naming patterns
Detection flags processes with keyboard monitoring behavior
Returns list of flagged processes with threat level indicators
Includes process details: name, PID, and suspicious characteristics

requirements.text: Build behavioral analysis engine that evaluates detected anomalies and generates comprehensive threat assessments combining data from phishing and keylogger detection modules

quotes: If any anomaly is detected, the system alerts the user

acceptanceCriteria: Engine correlates phishing and keylogger detection results
Calculates overall system threat level
Identifies behavioral patterns indicating active attacks
Returns detailed threat assessment with severity classification

requirements.text: Implement real-time alert and notification system that triggers immediate warnings when phishing URLs or keylogger processes are detected, displaying threat details and recommended actions
acceptanceCriteria: Display prominent alert notifications when threats are detected
Show specific threat type (phishing or keylogger)
Include threat severity level in alerts
Provide recommended actions for each threat type
Alerts are dismissible but logged for history

requirements.text: Create security reporting and logging system that generates detailed reports of detected threats including: timestamp, threat type, risk assessment, detection method, and historical threat tracking
acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores threat detection logs with timestamps
Frontend displays security report dashboard
Reports include all threat details: type, severity, detection method
Historical view shows trends and patterns over time
Reports are exportable or viewable in organized format

requirements.text: Design URL analysis interface where users can input URLs for phishing detection, displaying real-time analysis results with visual indicators for threat levels and specific risk factors identified
acceptanceCriteria: Input field for URL submission
Submit button triggers analysis
Display loading state during analysis
Show results with color-coded threat levels (safe, suspicious, dangerous)
List specific risk factors found in the URL
Display domain reputation score

requirements.text: Build process monitoring dashboard that displays currently running processes with security status, highlighting suspicious processes detected by the keylogger detection module with detailed threat information
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows list of monitored processes
Each process displays: name, PID, and security status
Suspicious processes are highlighted with warning indicators
Click on process to view detailed threat analysis
Refresh button to update process list
Filter options to show all processes or only suspicious ones

requirements.text: Implement system overview dashboard showing real-time security status, active threats count, recent alerts, and quick access to URL scanning and process monitoring features
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard displays overall system security status
Shows count of active threats detected
Lists recent alerts chronologically
Provides quick action buttons for URL scanning and process monitoring
Visual indicators for system health status

requirements.text: Design a cybersecurity-focused visual theme with a professional security interface aesthetic featuring dark mode optimized colors, technical typography, and alert-appropriate color coding (green for safe, yellow/orange for suspicious, red for dangerous) applied consistently throughout the application
acceptanceCriteria: Consistent dark theme color palette appropriate for security software
Technical, professional typography choices
Color-coded threat levels used consistently across all components
Visual hierarchy emphasizes alerts and important security information
Interface conveys trustworthiness and technical competence

constraints: Backend must use single-actor Motoko architecture in backend/main.mo

Frontend immutable paths must not be edited: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Frontend must use React, Tailwind CSS, and React Query stack
System cannot execute actual process scanning on user machines due to browser security limitations - process monitoring must be simulated or educational
Cannot integrate external Python libraries or system-level process monitoring tools
Cannot perform actual system-level keylogger detection - must demonstrate concepts through web-based simulation
nonGoals: Integration with Python psutil library or system-level process access
Automatic quarantine or termination of malicious processes
Machine learning or AI-based classification models
Administrative privilege requirements or system-level scanning

required: Cybersecurity shield icon with circuit board pattern for main logo (security-shield-logo.dim_256x256.png)
Warning alert icon with exclamation mark for threat notifications (alert-warning-icon.dim_128x128.png)
Phishing hook illustration for URL analysis section (phishing-hook-icon.dim_128x128.png)
Process monitoring gear icon for keylogger detection section (process-monitoring-icon.dim_128x128.png)
